text: In this synthetic in vitro assay, osimertinib inhibited mutant EGFR with an IC50 of 12 nM, whereas gefitinib inhibited the same target with an IC50 of 38 nM.
note: two inhibitors grounded to their declared target

text: This toy pharmacology record reports that salbutamol activated the beta-2 adrenergic receptor with an EC50 of 3.2 nM and a Ki of 1.1 nM.
EGFR activating variants are associated with response to tyrosine kinase inhibitors in non-small cell lung cancer.

text: TP53 mutation status is a broad marker of altered tumor suppressor biology.
